---
title: "Teaching — Mete Akcaoglu"
---

# Teaching

Professor of Instructional Technology · Georgia Southern University

## Current Teaching

2025–2026
:   **ITEC 8135 — Advanced Instructional Design**

    Graduate course in the Instructional Technology program. Department chair administrative release for remaining load.

## Doctoral Advisees

William Bell (2025–Present)
:   *Role of Engagement on Student Academic Performance in Rural Schools*

Moneak McCray (2025–Present)
:   *Impact of Instructional Leadership on School Success in Rural Contexts*

## Courses Designed

Courses I designed or significantly redesigned during my time at Georgia Southern University and West Virginia University.

- ITEC 8135 — Advanced Instructional Design (2026)
- IDS 4111 — Integrative Studies Capstone (2024)
- IDS 2111 — Integrative Studies Foundations (2024)
- FRIT 7238 — Technology in Education (2024)
- ITEC 8839 — Emerging Technologies (2020)
- ITEC 3132 — Instructional Technology for Teachers (2019)
- ITEC 3131 — Intro to Instructional Technology (2019)
- FRIT 7236 — Instructional Design (2014)
- IDT 740 — Instructional Design (2014, West Virginia University)
- EDP 600 — Educational Psychology (2013, West Virginia University)

## Teaching Areas

- Instructional design and technology integration
- Research methods and data analysis
- Game-based learning and computational thinking
- Online learning design
- Educational psychology

[View complete teaching record →](cv.html#teaching-experience)
